expected_action: should place CLI implementation in src/lib/ and add tests in test/ when adding a CLI command
directive: Adding a CLI command: Entry point: bin/nemoclaw.js (launches the compiled CLI in dist/). Main CLI implementation lives in src/lib/ and compiles to dist/lib/. Add tests in test/

content: Add a new 'status' CLI command that shows the current NemoClaw agent status.
